# GitHub authority

The assigned issue is the task boundary.

Do not create or begin other issues, restructure issue relationships, change repository workflow rules, merge pull requests, or delete branches unless explicitly requested.

If the assigned issue is too broad, blocked, or unclear, report the problem and proposed next step, then stop.

Before editing, provide a short proposal and wait for approval when touching multiple files, core backend systems, scripts, validation harnesses, desktop, Docker/compose, dependencies, environment repair, or repository tooling configuration.
